name: Tuna Cheese with Fresh Anchovies in Scapece
recipeIngredient: 16 fresh anchovies, gutted and heads removed
1 bunch Italian parsley, finely chopped (yielding 1/4 cup)
8 oz Tuna cheese (or substitute fresh Mozzarella)
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay anchovy fillets out on a marble cutting board or cookie sheet.
2. Divide lemon juice and zest evenly over the anchovies.
3. Place in refrigerator and allow to marinate for 2 hours.
4. Remove from refrigerator, add salt, pepper, olive oil, chopped parsley, and crushed red pepper flakes to a mixing bowl.
5. Stir gently to coat, being careful not to break the anchovies.
6. Set aside (sauce can stay overnight in refrigerated state).
7. Divide cheese into 4 equal pieces.
8. Arrange anchovies over and around the cheese.
9. Spoon 1 tablespoon of sauce over each serving.
Yield: 4 servings
